title: Ender Dingus
description: This texture pack renames the Ender Dragon to the Ender Dingus, and a few other dragon related items, to have dingus in them too.
body:
This pack is extremly useless. It renames the Ender Dragon to Ender Dingus, and changes the names of a few other end related items, but you'll have to download the pack to find them :)

Changelog:

26.1.2- Improved version support, changed profile picture - no longer AI slop
